caption: A screen recording shows a Google Sheets spreadsheet titled "10/22/23 - Topps Museum Collection Basketball 6 Box V2 Case #2...". The spreadsheet contains a list of NBA team abbreviations along the bottom row, including "LAA, LAD, CHI, PIT, MIL, COL, CLE, WSH, TB". Overlaid on the right side of the screen is a chat window with a message from "Nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/N2SdeSkg0". Above this, a user named "ragnarr" comments, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can". A banner at the bottom of the screen reads "WWW.JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM" and features the "CASEBREAKS.COM" logo. Throughout the sequence, a mouse cursor moves across the spreadsheet, clicking and highlighting different cells.
